# Support

## Questions and usage help

For usage questions, examples, or design discussions, please use:

- GitHub Discussions: https://github.com/techwizrd/calmplots/discussions

## Bug reports and feature requests

Please open an issue and use the templates:

- Issues: https://github.com/techwizrd/calmplots/issues

## Security reports

Please do not file public issues for security concerns.
See `SECURITY.md` for responsible disclosure details.
